findings.description: Faint blue-tinged smoke visible from the right-side exhaust during throttle blip in frames 3-5. Consistent with oil entering the combustion chamber.
Drive chain shows visible elongation between sprocket teeth, surface rust on outer plates, and an O-ring missing from one link. Approaching service limit.
findings.location_in_image: left side, drive chain at rear sprocket

findings.description: Coolant temperature gauge needle is in the lower third of normal operating range; no warning lights illuminated.

input.overall_assessment: The bike shows two diagnostic concerns: probable oil-burn (rings or valve seals) and chain wear approaching service limit. Coolant system operating normally based on gauge readings. Recommend compression test and chain measurement.
suggested_diagnostics: Compression test on all cylinders, comparing readings
Leakdown test if compression is borderline
Measure chain elongation against service-limit spec from manual
Inspect spark plugs for oil fouling
input.image_quality_note: Frames are well-lit and in focus; smoke detection is at the edge of frame visibility but consistent across 3 sequential frames.
